creator: nelsonnc74@gmail.com
text:
Hi guys,

Noobie here. GIMP shows this message every time I close it.

Working on GhostBSD (not FreeBSD directly). When click "Open Bug Tracker", it brings me directly here.

All the best!

```
GNU Image Manipulation Program version 2.10.36

Build: unknown rev 0 for other
# C compiler #
```
